test.name: Test Get Student By ID 22

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=api_session, url=http://localhost:3001, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: ${params} = {'userName': 'testuser'}
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:3001/students/get/22?userName=testuser path_url=/students/get/22?userName=testuser headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None
${response} = <Response [200]>
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.msg: Argument types are: <class 'int'> <class 'str'>
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.msg: ${json_body} = {'id': 22, 'name': 'Oscar Baker', 'dob': '2006-06-14', 'class': 1, 'className': 'Ampere'}
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.msg: Argument types are: <class 'int'> <class 'str'>
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.
